definition: Consciousness arising dependent on ear and sound.
notes: The project prefers ear-consciousness because it stays close to the sixfold analytical pattern. Auditory consciousness is acceptable in explanatory prose if a smoother English phrase helps.

context_rules.context: In most analytical and source-facing contexts
In explanatory prose where the English compound needs softening

example_phrases.pali: sotañca paṭicca sadde ca uppajjati sotaviññāṇaṃ
example_phrases.translation: dependent on the ear and sounds, ear-consciousness arises
